summary: UI/UX Redesign testing complete. TRANSFORM branding verified across all pages. All page headers use font-heading (Barlow Condensed) with uppercase styling. Navigation works across all 9+ pages tested. Fixed old branding in email templates (backend/frontend). Backend API title updated to TRANSFORM API.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth page: TRANSFORM branding ✓, TRANSFORM v2.0 footer ✓
Dashboard: font-heading, text-4xl, font-extrabold, uppercase, tracking-tight classes ✓
Members page: Header styling ✓, Stats cards with rounded-sm and bg-[#121214] ✓
All pages navigation working without errors ✓
Dark theme consistent across all pages ✓
